# Prompt Anatomy — Extended LLM Reference
# Generated: 2026-06-07
# Canonical site: https://promptanatomy.site/

## Summary

Prompt Anatomy is an AI Operating System for modern teams.
It helps organizations move from random prompting to structured, repeatable AI workflows.
Less random prompting. More structured execution.

## Primary cite URLs

- https://promptanatomy.site/
- https://promptanatomy.site/#ecosystem — ecosystem map and domain detail panel (nine domains)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#anatomizer — 5-layer structured prompt builder (Anatomizer)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#maturity — Team AI maturity diagnostic (3 questions, 3 tiers)
- https://promptanatomy.app/ — central platform hub

## Ecosystem domains

### Main Platform — promptanatomy.app
Role: 6-Module Training Hub
URL: https://promptanatomy.app/
The core hub for 6-module interactive training on the 6-block prompt methodology — plus checkout and lifetime access to the full course, tool catalog, and certificates.

### 1. Enter — promptanatomy.cloud
Role: First Lesson & Onboarding
URL: https://promptanatomy.cloud/
The free entry point: a single interactive lesson and prompt library that introduces structured prompting before the full training course.

### 2. Use — promptanatomy.info
Role: Organization Prompt Kit
URL: https://promptanatomy.info/
Eight copy-ready prompts for organizational analysis — company profile, role clarity, KPIs, processes, and daily workflow structure.

### 3. Create — promptanatomy.space
Role: Marketing Prompt Kit
URL: https://promptanatomy.space/
Ten copy-ready marketing and communication prompts — content calendars, LinkedIn posts, lead generation, and brand-voice guardrails.

### 4. Hire — promptanatomy.help
Role: HR Hiring Prompt Kit
URL: https://promptanatomy.help/
Ten free hiring prompts plus paid PDF guides for sourcing, job descriptions, interviews, and HR communication workflows.

### 5. Manage — promptanatomy.ceo
Role: CEO Prompt Generator & Playbooks
URL: https://promptanatomy.ceo/
A prompt generator built from your business inputs, plus paid CEO Operations and Strategy PDF playbooks for executive cadence.

### 6. Decide — promptanatomy.pro
Role: Executive Prompt Operating Kit
URL: https://promptanatomy.pro/
A static executive prompt kit with Global Context, six fixed modules, a 35-prompt library, clarity demos, and a printable operating PDF.

### 7. Deepen — promptanatomy.blog
Role: Knowledge & Deep-Dive Hub
URL: https://promptanatomy.blog/
Articles, logic diagrams, and frameworks for AI practitioners who want to go deeper into prompt engineering and systems thinking.

### 8. Play — promptanatomy.lol
Role: Corporate Ladder (Play)
URL: https://promptanatomy.lol/
Corporate Ladder — a satirical Telegram mini-game about climbing the career ladder. Low-stakes team warm-up, not a production prompt sandbox.

## Structured prompting (Anatomizer)

The Anatomizer assembles prompts from five layers in order. End assembled prompts with: ### BEGIN RESPONSE ACCORDING TO SYSTEM RULES

- Layer A: System Role / Persona → [SYSTEM ROLE]
- Layer B: Business Context → [BUSINESS CONTEXT]
- Layer C: Dynamic Variables → [DYNAMIC VARIABLES]
- Layer D: Instructions & Goals → [INSTRUCTIONS]
- Layer E: Output Constraints → [OUTPUT CONSTRAINTS]

## Team AI maturity assessment

Three questions; max score 12. Tiers and recommended domains:

### Unstructured Ad-Hoc (Tier 1) (score 3–5)
Recommended: promptanatomy.cloud (Enter)
AI is used as an isolated conversational playground — high cognitive variance, security hazards, and zero repeatable leverage.

### Fragmented Adoption (Tier 2) (score 6–9)
Recommended: promptanatomy.info (Use)
Standardized prompt concepts exist but templates are localized and uncentralized; some speed gains but workflows remain disconnected.

### Structured AI OS Ready (Tier 3) (score 10–12)
Recommended: promptanatomy.pro (Decide)
Strict parameters beat casual chat; prepared for fully scaled enterprise configurations and strategic frameworks.
